title: (Bullish Signal) TWOU, Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) Histogram just turned positive
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This is a Bullish indicator signaling TWOU's price could rise from here. Traders may explore going long the stock or buying call options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor identified 48 similar cases where TWOU's MACD histogram became positive, and 41 of them led to successful outcomes. Odds of Success: 85%. Current price $38.63 crossed the support line at $38.78 and is trading between $38.78 support and $33.94 resistance lines. Throughout the month of 02/18/21 - 03/22/21, the price experienced a -25% Downtrend. During the week of 03/15/21 - 03/22/21, the stock fell -0.50%.

https://preview.redd.it/z5ctix91yto61.png?width=1527&format=png&auto=webp&s=626dc9d396f2e5d8f6104cfb838c0be3033949e0

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The RSI Oscillator points to a transition from a downward trend to an upward trend -- in cases where TWOU's RSI Oscillator exited the oversold zone, 20 of 28 resulted in an increase in price. Tickeron's analysis proposes that the odds of a continued upward trend are 71%.

The Stochastic Indicator suggests the stock price trend may be in a reversal from a downward trend to an upward trend. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 39 of 47 cases where TWOU's Stochastic Oscillator exited the oversold zone resulted in an increase in price. Tickeron's analysis proposes that the odds of a continued upward trend are 83%.

The Momentum Indicator moved above the 0 level on March 17, 2021. You may want to consider a long position or call options on TWOU as a result. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 64 of 77 past instances where the momentum indicator moved above 0, the stock continued to climb. The odds of a continued upward trend are 83%.

Following a +6.46% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where TWOU advanced for three days, in 308 of 376 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 82%.
